action.reasoning: Observation: NCM val_acc=0.5024 after 30 epochs/task with replay+KD+herding. Big jump from 0.2436 baseline. Took 227s. Analysis: NCM consistently better than softmax. Need to verify on test eval, then push further. Decision: Submit eval to confirm test accuracy, then iterate to improve.
